idle.action: calm seated idle; subtle breathing, slow tail sway, occasional slow blink; aloof cool face

talk.action: talking loop; mouth opens and closes, minimal facial change, occasional small head tilt; body stays seated and still

thinking.action: pondering loop; paw near chin, eyes glance upward, tail tip flicks slowly

happy.action: pleased reaction; face stays cool but tail swishes up and ears perk clearly; subtle happy body language (tsundere gap)

sad.action: downcast reaction; ears fold down, body curls smaller, tail lowers to the floor

surprised.action: startled reaction; fur puffs and eyes widen by the middle frames, then settles back toward a composed cool pose on the final frame

idle_down.action: low-mood seated idle; ears drooped, tail limp toward the floor, slightly hunched; subdued

idle_up.action: good-mood seated idle; quicker happy tail sway, ears perked, small paw tap; face still cool (gap)
